# QuantikGrowth

> QuantikGrowth is a digital-infrastructure studio for investment firms. We do three things: design clean, fast websites built around a firm's track record and portfolio; on-page SEO so the firm is found by the people searching for it; and a content engine that turns a partner's voicenotes and videos into polished written articles and repurposed social posts across LinkedIn, X, and short-form video. Based in Mumbai, India. There is no chatbot.

We serve two audiences, with a parallel site for each:

- **Venture & private equity firms** (the default track, at `/`): https://quantikgrowth.in/
- **Portfolio management (PMS) & investment firms** (at `/portfolio`): https://quantikgrowth.in/portfolio

## The three services (same for both audiences)

- **Website design** — We rebuild the site around the work. For a venture firm, the portfolio becomes a set of investment case studies rather than a logo wall; for a PMS firm, the site communicates track record, strategy and SEBI registration with institutional clarity. Sub-second loads, mobile-first.
- **On-page SEO** — We make the firm findable by the people who matter: founders and LPs searching for a venture firm, or HNIs and advisors searching for a PMS. The three reasons it matters: inbound (people arrive already convinced), discoverability (you rank for your own terms instead of directories), and authority (your pages read as the clearest thinking on the subject).
- **Content engine (voicenote/video to articles + social)** — A partner or fund manager records a two-minute voicenote or short video; we turn it into a finished article in the firm's voice, published and SEO-structured on the firm's own site, then repurposed into LinkedIn posts, an X thread, and short clips. The partner spends minutes; the firm publishes everywhere, weekly.

## How we work

We build a real first design of the new site before the client commits. If they love it, we continue with three revisions included; if not, they owe nothing. A typical full build runs about six weeks from kickoff to launch.

- Flagship article — "Why a venture firm should think like a publisher, not a marketer": https://quantikgrowth.in/writing/think-like-a-publisher
